summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Rinkosh fintech platform iteration 3 Phase 3 enhancements. Backend APIs working excellently (100% success rate). Frontend UI and new Phase 3 features tested successfully. All new admin analytics dashboard, global language switching, and custom logo/motto features functional.

ui_bugs.issue: Button text doesn't change to Hindi when language is switched

integration_issues.issue: Frequent session timeouts during testing causing redirects to login

passed_tests: Backend health check
Admin analytics endpoint GET /api/admin/analytics with stats, leads_by_status, leads_by_bank, commission_summary
Admin lead update PUT /api/admin/leads/{lead_id} changes status successfully
Non-admin users get 403 on admin endpoints (access control working)
Admin dashboard page at /admin renders with all components
Admin dashboard shows lead funnel bar chart (horizontal bar chart with status breakdown)
Admin dashboard shows leads-by-bank pie chart with bank distribution
Commission tracking card displays revenue and conversion metrics
Recent leads table shows leads with Lead ID, Bank, Product, Status, Date, Action columns
Language toggle on landing page switches between EN and HI
Language toggle on dashboard switches language globally
Hero heading updates when language changes (EN: 'Stop Overpaying on Loans' → HI: 'लोन पर ज़्यादा पैसे देना बंद करें')
Motto updates when language changes (EN: 'No Spam. No Secrets. Just Savings.' → HI: 'कोई स्पैम नहीं। कोई राज़ नहीं। बस बचत।')
Admin dashboard title updates (EN: 'Admin Analytics' → HI: 'एडमिन एनालिटिक्स')
Language persists in localStorage
Logo mark displays in navbar on landing page (Rinkosh with shield icon)
Motto 'No Spam. No Secrets. Just Savings.' shown on landing page
User registration flow working
Dashboard navigation and tabs functional
All previously tested features still functional (auth, recommendations, leads, AI, comparison, credit builder)
AI advisor endpoint working (fixed from iteration 2)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Update landing page buttons to use translation system for Hindi text. Consider improving session management to reduce timeout issues during extended usage.
